title: Global coal use at all-time high in 2023 - IEA | Reuters
description: Global coal use is expected to reach a record high in 2023 as demand in emerging and developing economies remains strong, the International Energy Agency (IEA) said in a report on Friday.
bodyText: Get weekly news and analysis on the U.S. elections and how it matters to the world with the newsletter On the Campaign Trail. Sign up  here. Reporting by Forrest Crellin; editing by David Evans Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles.New Tab, opens new tab
